'Almost every line of the dialogue sounds like it comes from an old movie,' the reviewer wrote." So, the reviewer says the attack scenes were powerful (so A is incorrect because they say it's powerful, not that it leaves no impression). The attack comes late, but the problem is with the characters and love story. The reviewer was "less impressed with the characters and the love story." That would point towards option C, which says the characters and love story are less attractive. Option D says the attack scenes occupy too much time.
